PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS $3,075 VIA CHECK. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR JUNE-05, 2023 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
